block.header: opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba amakumo no ikaduti no upe ni iporaseru kamo
opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba kumogakuru ikadutiyama ni miya sikiimasu
ina to ipedo sipuru sipwi no ga sipwikatari ko no koro kikazute ware kwopwinikyeri
ina to ipedo katare katare to norase koso sipwi i pa mawose sipwikatari to noru
opomiya no uti made kikoyu abiki su to agwo totonopuru ama no ywobikowe

yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu wa ga pinomikwo no uma namete mikari tataseru wakakomowo karidi no wonwo ni sisi kosoba ipapiworogame udura koso ipapimotopore sisizimono ipapiworogami uduranasu ipapimotopori kasikwomito tukapematurite pisakatano ame miru gotoku maswokagami apugite miredo parukusano iya medurasiki wa go opokimi kamo

sentence.transcription: wa ga pi no mi kwo no
mi kari tata s e ru

block.header: pisakatano amayuku tukwi wo ami ni sasi wa ga opokimi pa kinugasa ni seri
opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba makwi no tatu arayamanaka ni umi wo nasu kamo
taginoupe no mipunenoyama ni wiru kumo no tune ni aramu to wa ga omopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga omopa na ku ni

block.header: opokimi pa titose ni masamu sirakumo mo mipunenoyama ni tayuru pi arame ya
miyosinwo no mipunenoyama ni tatu kumo no tune ni aramu to wa ga omopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga omopa na ku ni

block.header: kiku ga goto makoto taputwoku kususiku mo kamusabwi woru ka kore no midusima
asikita no nwosaka no ura yu punade site midusima ni yukamu nami tatu na yume
oki tu nami pyenami tatu tomo wa ga sekwo ga mipune no tomari nami tatame ya mo
payapito no satuma no setwo wo kumowi nasu topoku mo ware pa kyepu mituru kamo
mitunosaki nami wo kasikwomi komoriye no pune n aru kimi pa yadorinu sima ni
tamamo karu minume wo sugwite natukusano nwosimagasaki ni pune tikadukinu
tamamo karu wotomye wo sugwite natukusano nwosimagasaki ni ipori su ware pa
apadi no nwosimagasaki no pamakaze ni imo ga musubisi pimo pukikapyesu
aratapeno pudiyenoura ni suzuki turu ama to ka mi ramu tabi yuku ware wo
inabinwo mo yukisugwikateni omopyereba kokoro kwoposiki kakwo no sima miyu
inabinwo mo yukisugwikateni omopyereba kokoro kwoposiki kakwo no mitwo miyu
tomosibwino akasiopotwo ni iru pi ni ka kogiwakarenamu ipye no atari mizu
amazakaru pina no nagati yu kwopwikureba akasinotwo ywori yamatosima miyu
amazakaru pina no nagati yu kwopwikureba akasinotwo ywori yadwo no atari miyu
kepi no umi no nipa yoku a rasi karikomono midareidu miyu ama no turibune

sentence.transcription: nipa yo ku a ra si

block.header: mukwonoumi no nipa yoku a rasi izari suru ama no turibune nami no upe yu miyu

sentence.transcription: nipa yo ku a ra si
nami no upe yu mi yu

block.header: amorituku amenokaguyama kasumi tatu paru ni itareba matukaze ni ikenami tatite sakurabana ko no kuresige ni okipye pa kamo tuma ywobapi pye tu pye ni adimura sawaki momosikwino opomiyapito no makaridete aswobu pune ni pa kadisawo mo nakute sabusi mo kogu pito nasi ni
pito kogazu araku mo sirusi kaduki suru wosi to takabye to pune no pe ni sumu
itu no ma mo kamusabwikyeru ka kaguyama no pokosugwi no moto ni koke musu madeni

amorituku kamwi no kaguyama utinabiku paru sarikureba sakurabana ko no kuresige ni matukaze ni ikenami tati pye tu pye ni pa adimura sawaki okibye ni pa kamo tuma ywobapi momosikwino opomiyapito no makaridete kogikyeru pune pa sawo kadi mo nakute sabusi mo kogamu to omopedo
yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu pinomikwo sakayemasu opotono no upe ni pisakatano amatutapikuru yukizimono yukikaywopitutu iya tokoyo made
yaturiyama kodati mo miyezu purimagapu yuki ni ugutuku asita tanwosi mo

sentence.transcription: ko dati mo mi ye zu

block.header: uma na itaku utite na yuki so kenarabete mite mo wa ga yuku siga ni aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: mi te mo wa ga yuku

block.header: mononopuno yaswoudikapa no azirwokwi ni isayopu nami no yuku pye sirazu mo
kurusiku mo purikuru ame ka miwanosaki sanwo no watari ni ipye mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: ipye mo ara na ku ni

block.header: apuminoumi yupunamitidori na ga nakeba kokoro mo sinwoni inisipye omopoyu
musasabi pa konure motomu to asipikwino yama no satuwo ni apinikyeru kamo
wa ga sekwo ga purupye no satwo no asuka ni pa tidori naku nari sima matikanete
pito mizupa wa ga swode motite kakusamu wo moyetutu ka aramu kizute kinikyeri
tabi nisite mono kwoposiki ni yamasita no ake no sopopune oki pye kogu miyu
sakurada pye tadu nakiwataru ayutigata sipo pwinikye rasi tadu nakiwataru
sipatuyama utikwoye mireba kasanupinosima kogikakuru tana nasi wobune
iswo no saki kogitamwiyukeba apuminoumi ya swo no minatwo ni tadu sapani naku
wa ga pune pa pira no minatwo ni kogi patemu oki pye na sakari saywo pukenikyeri
iduku ni ka ware pa yadoramu takasima no katunwo no para ni ko no pi kurenaba

sentence.transcription: ko no pi kure na ba

block.header: imo mo ware mo pitotu nare kamo mikapa n aru putami no miti yu wakarekaneturu
mikapa no putami no miti yu wakarenaba wa ga se mo ware mo pitori ka mo yukamu

sentence.transcription: wa ga se mo ware mo
pito ri ka mo yuka mu

block.header: twoku kite mo mitemasi monowo yamasiro no taka no tukwimura tirinikyeru kamo
sika no ama pa me kari sipo yaki itwoma nami keduri no wogusi tori mo minaku ni
wagimokwo ni winanwo pa misetu nasukiyama tunwo no matubara itu ka simyesamu
iza kwodomo yamato pye payaku sirasuge no manwo no paripara taworite yukamu
sirasuge no manwo no paripara yukusa kusa kimi koso mi rame manwo no paripara
tunwosapapu ipare mo sugwizu patuseyama itu ka mo kwoyemu ywo pa pukenitutu
suminoye no enatu ni tatite miwataseba mukwo no tomari yu iduru punabito
yakitubye ni wa ga yukisikaba suruga n aru abe no itidi ni apisi kwora pa mo

sentence.transcription: api si kwo ra pa mo

block.header: takupireno kakemaku posiki imo ga na wo ko no senoyama ni kakeba ikani aramu

sentence.transcription: ko no se no yama ni

block.header: takupireno kakemaku posiki imo ga na wo ko no senoyama ni kapeba ikani aramu

sentence.transcription: ko no se no yama ni

block.header: yorosinape wa ga se no kimi ga opikinisi ko no senoyama wo imo to pa ywobazi

sentence.transcription: wa ga se no kimi ga
ko no se no yama wo

block.header: koko ni site ipye ya mo iduku sirakumo no tanabiku yama wo kwoyete kinikyeri
wa ga inoti no masakiku araba mata mo mimu siga no opotu ni yosuru siranami
ama no para purisakemireba siramayumi parite kaketari ywomiti pa yokyemu

sentence.transcription: ywo miti pa yo kye mu

block.header: kurapasinoyama wo takami ka ywogomori ni idekuru tukwi no pikari tomosiki
makwi no pa no sinapu senoyama sinwopazute wa ga kwoyenuru pa konopa sirikyemu

sentence.transcription: ko no pa siri kye mu

block.header: pisakatano ama no sagumye ga ipapune no patesi takatu pa asenikyeru kamo
sipopwi no mitu no ama no kugutu moti tamamo karu ramu iza yukite mimu
kaze wo itami oki tu siranami takaka rasi ama no turibune pama ni kapyerinu
suminoye no nwokwi no matubara topotukamwi wa go opokimi no idemasidokoro
ipopara no kiywominosaki no mipo no ura no yutakeki mitutu monomopi mo nasi
piru miredo akanu tagwonoura opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi yworu mituru kamo
matutiyama yupu kwoyeyukite iposaki no sumidagapara ni pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: okuyama no suga no pa sinwogi puru yuki no kenaba wosikyemu ame na puri sone
sapo sugwite nara no tamuke ni oku nusa pa imo wo mekarezu apimisime to so
ipa ga ne no kogosiki yama wo kwoyekanete ne ni pa naku tomo iro ni ideme ya mo

sentence.transcription: iro ni ide me ya mo

block.header: kwora ga ipyedi yaya madopoki wo nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi ni kipopiapemu kamo
nagupasiki inami no umi no oki tu nami tipye ni kakurinu yamatosimane pa
opokimi no topono mikadwo to arigaywopu simatwo wo mireba kamuyo si omopoyu
kaku yuweni mizi to ipu monowo sasanami no puruki miyakwo wo misetutu motona
isenoumi no oki tu siranami pana ni moga tutumite imo ga ipyedutwo ni semu
padasusuki kume no wakugwo ga imasikyeru mipo no ipaya pa miredo akanu kamo
padasusuki kume no wakugwo ga imasikyemu mipo no ipaya pa arenikyeru kamo
tokipa naru ipaya pa ima mo arikyeredo sumikyeru pito so tunenakarikyeru
ipayatwo ni tateru matu no kwi na wo mireba mukasi no pito wo apimiru gotosi
pimugasi no iti no uwekwi no kodaru made apazu pisasimi ube kwopwinikyeri
adusayumi piki toyokuni no kagamiyama mizu pisanaraba kwoposikyemu kamo
mukasi koso nanipa winaka to iparekyeme ima pa miyakwopiki miyakwobwinikyeri
miyosinwo no taki no siranami siranedomo katari si tugeba inisipye omopoyu
sazarenami iswo kwosidi naru notosegapa oto no sayakesa tagitu se gotoni
miyosinwo no yosinwonomiya pa yamakara si taputwokaru rasi kapakara si sayakekaru rasi ametuti to nagaku pisasiku yoroduyo ni kaparazu aramu idemasi no miya
mukasi misi kisanowogapa wo ima mireba iyoyo sayakeku narinikyeru kamo

ame tuti no wakaresi toki yu kamusabwite takaku taputwoki suruga n aru puzinotakane wo ama no para purisakemireba wataru pi no kage mo kakurapi teru tukwi no pikari mo miyezu sirakumo mo iyukipabakari tokiziku so yuki pa purikyeru kataritugi ipitugiyukamu puzinotakane pa
tagwonoura yu utiidete mireba masirwoni so puzinotakane ni yuki pa purikyeru

namayomino kapwi no kuni utiyosuru suruganokuni to kotigoti no kuni no minaka yu idetateru puzinotakane pa amakumo mo iyukipabakari tobu tori mo tobi mo noborazu moyuru pwi wo yuki moti keti puru yuki wo pwi moti ketitutu ipi mo ezu naduke mo sirazu kususiku mo imasu kamwi kamo senoumi to nadukete aru mo so no yama no tutumyeru umi so puzikapa to pito no wataru mo so no yama no midu no tagiti so pinomotono yamatonokuni no sidume to mo imasu kamwi kamo takara to mo nareru yama kamo suruga n aru puzinotakane pa miredo akanu kamo
puzinone ni purioku yuki pa minadukwi no moti ni kenureba so no ywo purikyeri
puzinone wo takami kasikwomi amakumo mo iyukipabakari tanabiku monowo

sumyeroki no kamwi no mikoto no sikimaseru kuni no kotogoto yu pa si mo sapani aredomo simayama no yorosiki kuni to kogosi kamo iyo no takane no izanipa no woka ni tatasite uta omopi koto omopasisi miyu no upe no komura wo mireba ominokwi mo opwituginikyeri naku tori no kowe mo kaparazu topoki yo ni kamusabwiyukamu idemasidokoro
momosikwino opomiyapito no nikitatu ni punanori sikyemu tosi no siranaku

mimoro no kamunabwiyama ni ipoye sasi sizini opwitaru tuga no kwi no iya tugitugini tamakadura tayuru koto naku aritutu mo yamazu kaywopamu asuka no puruki miyakwo pa yama takami kapa toposirosi paru no pi pa yama si migaposi aki no ywo pa kapa si sayakesi asakumo ni tadu pa midare yupugwiri ni kapadu pa sawaku miru gotoni ne nomwi si nakayu inisipye omopeba
asukagapa kapayodo sarazu tatu kwiri no omopisugu beki kwopwi ni aranaku ni
miwataseba akasinoura ni tomosu pwi no po ni so idenuru imo ni kwopuraku

sentence.transcription: po ni so ide nu ru

block.header: watatumi no oki ni motiyukite panatu tomo uremu so kore ga yomwigapyerinamu
awoniyosi naranomiyakwo pa saku pana no nipopu ga gotoku ima sakari nari
yasumisisi wa go opokimi no sikimaseru kuni no uti ni pa miyakwo si omopoyu
pudinami no pana pa sakari ni narinikyeri naranomiyakwo wo omoposu ya kimi
wa ga sakari mata wotime ya mo potopotoni naranomiyakwo wo mizu ka narinamu

sentence.transcription: mi zu ka nari na mu

block.header: wa ga inoti mo tune ni aranu ka mukasi misi kisanowogapa wo yukite mimu tame
asadipara tubaratubarani monomopeba purinisi satwo si omopoyuru kamo
wasurekusa wa ga pimo ni tuku kaguyama no purinisi satwo wo wasuremu ga tame
wa ga yuki pa pisani pa arazi imenowada se ni pa narazute puti ni arikoso
siranupi tukusi no wata pa mwi ni tukete imada pa kinedo atatakani miyu
okurara pa ima pa makaramu kwo naku ramu so wo opu papa mo wa wo matu ramu so
sirusi naki mono wo omopazu pa pitotuki no nigoreru sake wo nomu beku aru rasi
sake no na wo piziri to oposesi inisipye no opoki piziri no koto no yorosisa
inisipye no nana no sakasiki pitodomo mo pori sesi mono pa sake ni si aru rasi
sakasimito monoipu ywori pa sake nomite wepinaki suru si masaritaru rasi
ipamu subye semu subye sirazu kipamarite taputwoki mono pa sake ni si aru rasi
nakanakani pito to arazupa sakatubo ni narinitesika mo sake ni siminamu
ana miniku sakasira wo su to sake nomanu pito wo yoku mireba saru ni ka mo nimu

sentence.transcription: saru ni ka mo ni mu

block.header: atapi naki takara to ipu tomo pitotuki no nigoreru sake ni ani masame ya mo
yworu pikaru tama to ipu tomo sake nomite kokoro wo yaru ni ani sikame ya mo
yo no naka no aswobi no miti ni suzusikupa wepinaki suru ni aru bekaru rasi
ko no yo ni si tanwosiku araba komu yo ni pa musi ni tori ni mo ware pa narinamu
ikyeru mono tupini mo sinuru mono ni areba ko no yo n aru ma pa tanwosiku wo arana

sentence.transcription: ko no yo n aru ma pa

block.header: moda worite sakasira suru pa sake nomite wepinaki suru ni napo sikazukyeri
yononaka wo nani ni tatopemu asabiraki kogiinisi pune no atwo naki gotosi
asibye ni pa tadugane nakite minatwokaze samuku puku ramu tuwo no saki pa mo
miyosinwo no takakwinoyama ni sirakumo pa yukipabakarite tanabikyeri miyu
napa no ura ni sipo yaku keburi yupu sareba yukisugwikanete yama ni tanabiku
oponamuti sukunapikwona no imasikyemu situ no ipaya pa ikuyo penikyemu

sentence.transcription: iku yo pe ni kye mu

block.header: kyepu mo kamo asukanokapa no yupusarazu kapadu naku se no sayakeku aru ramu
asukagapa ima mo ka motona yupusarazu kapadu naku se no sayakeku aru ramu
napa no ura yu sogapi ni miyuru oki tu sima kogimwiru pune pa turi si su rasi mo
mukwonoura wo kogimwiru wobune apasima wo sogapi ni mitutu tomosiki wobune
abe no sima u no sumu iswo ni yosuru nami manaku ko no koro yamato si omopoyu

sentence.transcription: ma na ku ko no koro

block.header: sipo pwinaba tamamo karitumye ipye no imo ga pamadutwo kopaba nani wo simyesamu
akikaze no samuki asake wo sanunowoka kwoyu ramu kimi ni kinu kasamasi wo
misagwo wiru iswomwi ni opuru nanoriso no na pa norasiteyo oya pa siru tomo

sentence.transcription: na pa nora si te yo

block.header: misagwo wiru ariswo ni opuru nanoriso no yosi na pa norase oya pa siru tomo

sentence.transcription: yo si na pa nora se

block.header: masurawo no yuzuwe puriokosi ituru ya wo noti mimu pito pa kataritugu gane
sipotuyama utikwoyeyukeba a ga noreru uma so tumaduku ipye kwopu rasi mo

kwosinoumi no tunwoga no pama yu opobune ni makadi nukiorosi isanatori umidi ni idete apekitutu wa ga kogiyukeba masurawono tayupigaura ni amawotomye sipo yaku keburi kusamakura tabi ni si areba pitori site miru sirusi nami watatumi no te ni makasitaru tamatasuki kakete sinwopitu yamatosimane wo
kwosinoumi no tayupigaura wo tabi nisite mireba tomosimi yamato sinwopitu
opobune ni makadi sizinuki opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi iswomwi suru kamo
mononopu no omi no wotokwo pa opokimi no make no manima ni kiku to ipu mono so
puri purazu tonogumoru ywo pa nurepitu to kwopwitutu woriki kimi matigateri
ounoumi no kapara no tidori na ga nakeba wa ga sapogapa no omopoyuraku ni

parupiwo kasuganoyama no takakurano mikasanoyama ni asa sarazu kumowi tanabiki kapotori no manaku sibanaku kumowi nasu kokoro isaywopi so no tori no katakwopwi nomwi ni piru pa mo pi no kotogoto yworu pa mo ywo no kotogoto tatite wite omopi so wa ga suru apanu kwo yuweni

sentence.transcription: omopi so wa ga su ru

block.header: takakurano mikasanoyama ni naku tori no yameba tugaruru kwopwi mo suru kamo
ame puraba kimu to omopyeru kasa no yama pito ni na kisime nure pa pitu tomo
yosinwo n aru natumwinokapa no kapayodo ni kamo so naku naru yamakage nisite
akidupa no swode puru imo wo tamakusige oku ni omopu wo mitamapye wa ga kimi
awoyama no mine no sirakumo asa ni ke ni tune ni miredomo medurasi wa ga kimi
inisipye no puruki tutumi pa tosi pukami ike no nagisa ni mikusa opwinikyeri

pisakatano ama no para ywori arekitaru kamwi no mikoto okuyama no sakakwi no yeda ni sirakatuku yupu toritukete ipapibe wo ipapiporisuwe takatama wo sizini nukitari sisizimono piza woripusite tawayamye no osupi torikake kaku dani mo ware pa kopinamu kimi ni apazi kamo
yuputatami te ni torimotite kaku dani mo ware pa kopinamu kimi ni apazi kamo
ipye mopu to kokoro susumu na kazamamori yoku site imase arasi so no miti

toriganaku aduma no kuni ni takayama pa sapani aredomo putakamwi no taputwoki yama no namitati no migaposi yama to kamuyo ywori pito no ipitugi kunimi suru tukupanoyama wo puyugomori tokiziki toki to mizute yukaba masite kwoposimi yukige suru yamamiti sura wo nadumi zo wa ga kyeru

sentence.transcription: nadumi zo wa ga k ye ru

block.header: tukupane wo yoso nomwi mitutu arikanete yukige no miti wo nadumikyeru kamo
wa ga yadwo ni karaawi uweoposi karenuredo korizute mata mo makamu to so omopu
ararepuri kwisimigatake wo sagasimito kusa toripanati imo ga te wo toru
ko no yupubye tumi no sayeda no nagarekoba yana pa utazute torazu ka mo aramu

sentence.transcription: tora zu ka mo ara mu

block.header: inisipye ni yana utu pito no nakariseba koko ni mo aramasi tumi no yeda pa mo

watatumi pa kususiki mono ka apadisima naka ni tateokite siranami wo iyo ni megurasi wimatidukwi akasinotwo yu pa yupu sareba sipo wo mitasime ake sareba sipo wo pwisimuru siposawi no nami wo kasikwomi apadisima iswogakuriwite itusikamo ko no ywo no akemu to samorapu ni i no nekateneba taki no upe no asanwo no kigisi akenu to si tatisawaku rasi iza kwodomo apete kogidemu nipa mo sidukesi

sentence.transcription: ko no ywo no ake mu to

block.header: simadutapi minume no saki wo kogimwireba yamato kwoposiku tadu sapani naku
karu no ike no uramwi yukimwiru kamo surani tamamo no upe ni pitori nenaku ni
tobusa tate asigarayama ni punakwi kiri kwi ni kiriyukitu atarapunakwi wo
nubatamano so no ywo no ume wo tawasurete worazu kinikyeri omopisi monowo

sentence.transcription: so no ywo no ume wo

block.header: miyezu tomo tare kwopwizarame yama no pa ni isaywopu tukwi wo yoso ni mitesika
sime yupite wa ga sadametesi suminoye no pama no kwomatu pa noti mo wa ga matu
tukumanwo ni opuru murasaki kinu ni sime imada kizusite iro ni idenikyeri
mitinoku no manwo no kayapara topokyedomo omokage nisite miyu to ipu monowo

sentence.transcription: mi yu to ipu mono wo

block.header: okuyama no ipamotosuge wo ne pukamete musubisi kokoro wasurekanetu mo
imo ga ipye ni sakitaru ume no itu mo itu mo narinamu toki ni koto pa sadamemu
imo ga ipye ni sakitaru pana no ume no pana mwi ni si narinaba ka mo kaku mo semu

sentence.transcription: mwi ni si nari na ba
ka mo kaku mo se mu

block.header: ume no pana sakite tirinu to pito pa ipedo wa ga sime yupisi yeda ni arame ya mo

sentence.transcription: yeda ni ara me ya mo

block.header: yamamori no arikyeru sirani so no yama ni sime yupitatete yupi no padi situ
yamamori pa kedasi ari tomo wagimokwo ga yupikyemu sime wo pito tokame ya mo
asa ni ke ni mimaku pori suru so no tama wo ikani seba ka mo te yu karezu aramu

sentence.transcription: te yu kare zu ara mu

block.header: tipayaburu kamwi no yasiro si nakariseba kasuga no nwopye ni apa makamasi wo
kasuganwo ni apa makyeriseba sisi mati ni tugite yukamasi wo yasiro si todomuru
wa ga maturu kamwi ni pa arazu masurawo ni tukitaru kamwi so yoku maturu besi
parukasumi kasuga no satwo no uwekwonagwi nape nari to ipisi ye pa sasinikyemu

sentence.transcription: ye pa sasi ni kye mu

block.header: nadesikwo no so no pana ni moga asanasana te ni torimotite kwopwinu pi nakyemu

sentence.transcription: kwopwi nu pi na kye mu

block.header: pitopi ni pa tipyenami siki ni omopedomo na zo so no tama no te ni makigataki

sentence.transcription: na zo so no tama no

block.header: tatibana wo yadwo ni uweoposi tatite wite noti ni kuyu tomo sirusi arame ya mo
wagimokwo ga yadwo no tatibana ito tikaku uwetesi yuweni narazupa yamazi
inadaki ni kisumyeru tama pa putatu nasi ka ni mo kaku ni mo kimi ga manima ni

sentence.transcription: ka ni mo kaku ni mo

block.header: suma no ama no sipoyakikinu no pudikoromo matopo ni si areba imada kinarezu
asipikwi no ipane kogosimi suga no ne wo pikaba katamito sime nomwi so yupu
ipye ni araba imo ga te makamu kusamakura tabi ni koyaseru ko no tabito apare
momodutapu ipare no ike ni naku kamo wo kyepu nomwi mite ya kumogakurinamu
opokimi no mututama ape ya toyokuni no kagaminoyama wo miya to sadamuru
toyokuni no kagaminoyama no ipatwo tate komorinikye rasi matedo kimasazu
ipatwo waru tadikara moga mo taywowaki womina ni si areba subye no siranaku

nayutake no towoyoru mikwo saniturapu wa go opokimi pa komorikuno patusenoyama ni kamusabwi ni itukiimasu to tamadusa no pito so ipituru oyodure ka wa ga kikituru tapakoto ka wa ga kikituru mo ametuti ni kuyasiki koto no yononaka no kuyasiki koto pa amakumo no sokupye no kipami ametuti no itareru madeni tuwe tuki mo tukazu mo yukite yupuke twopi isiura motite wa ga yadwo ni mimoro wo tatete makurapye ni ipapibe wo suwe takadama wo manaku nukitari yuputasuki kapina ni kakete ame n aru sasaranowonwo no nanapusuge te ni torimotite pisakatano ama no kapara ni idetatite misogitemasi wo takayama no ipapo no upe ni imaseturu kamo
oyodure no tapakoto to kamo takayama no ipapo no upe ni kimi ga koyaseru
iswonokami puru no yama n aru sugwimura no omopisugu beki kimi ni aranaku ni

tunwosapapu ipare no miti wo asa sarazu yukikyemu pito no omopitutu kaywopikyemaku pa pototogisu naku satukwi ni pa ayamyegusa panatatibana wo tama ni nuki kadura ni semu to nagatukwi no sigure no toki pa momitiba wo wori kazasamu to papukuzuno iya toponagaku yoroduyo ni tayezi to omopite kaywopikyemu kimi woba asu yu yoso ni ka mo mimu

sentence.transcription: yoso ni ka mo mi mu

block.header: tunwosapapu ipare no miti wo asa sarazu yukikyemu pito no omopitutu kaywopikyemaku pa pototogisu naku satukwi ni pa ayamyegusa panatatibana wo nukimazipe kadura ni semu to nagatukwi no sigure no toki pa momitiba wo wori kazasamu to kuzunoneno iya toponagani opobuneno omopitanomite kaywopikyemu kimi wo asu yu pa yoso ni ka mo mimu

sentence.transcription: yoso ni ka mo mi mu

block.header: komorikuno patusewotomye ga te ni makyeru tama pa midarete ari to ipazu ya mo

sentence.transcription: ari to ipa zu ya mo

block.header: kapakaze no samuki patuse wo nagekitutu kimi ga aruku ni niru pito mo ape ya
kusamakura tabi no yadori ni ta ga tuma ka kuni wasuretaru ipye matamaku ni
momotarazu yaswokumasaka ni tamuke seba sugwinisi pito ni kedasi apamu kamo
komorikuno patusenoyama no yama no ma ni isaywopu kumo pa imo ni ka mo aramu

sentence.transcription: imo ni ka mo ara mu

block.header: yamanomayu idumo no kwora pa kwiri nare ya yosinwonoyama no mine ni tanabiku
yakumosasu idumo no kwora ga kurwokami pa yosinwonokapa no oki ni nadusapu

inisipye ni arikyemu pito no situpata no obi tokikapete puseya tate tumadopi sikyemu katusika no mama no tegwona ga okutukwi wo koko to pa kikedo makwi no pa ya sigeritaru ramu matugane ya topoku pisasiki koto nomwi mo na nomwi mo ware pa wasurayu masizi
ware mo mitu pito ni mo tugemu katusika no mama no tegwona ga okutukwidokoro
katusika no mama no iriye ni utinabiku tamamo karikyemu tegwona si omopoyu
kazapayano mipo no uramwi no siratutuzi miredomo sabusi naki pito omopeba
kazapayano mipo no uramwi no siratutuzi mireba kanasi mo naki pito omopu ni
mitumitusi kume no wakugwo ga ipurekyemu iswo no kusane no karemaku wosi mo
pitogoto no sigeki ko no koro tama naraba te ni makimotite kwopwizu aramasi wo
imo mo ware mo kiywominokapa no kapakwisi no imo ga kuyu beki kokoro pa motazi
utukusiki pito no makitesi sikitape no wa ga tamakura wo maku pito arame ya
kapyeru beku toki pa narikyeri miyakwo nite ta ga tamoto wo ka wa ga makurakamu

sentence.transcription: ta ga ta moto wo ka

block.header: miyakwo n aru aretaru ipye ni pitori neba tabi ni masarite kurusikaru besi
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi opoarakwi no toki ni pa aranedo kumogakurimasu
yononaka pa munasiki mono to aramu to so ko no teru tukwi pa mitikake sikyeru

amakumo no mukabusu kuni no mononopu to ipayuru pito pa sumyeroki no kamwi no mikadwo ni two no pye ni tatisamorapi uti no pye ni tukapematurite tamakadura iya toponagaku oya no na mo tugiyuku mono to omotiti ni tuma ni kwodomo ni katarapite tatinisi pi ywori taratineno papa no mikoto pa ipapibe wo mapye ni suweokite katate ni pa yupu torimoti katate ni pa nikitape maturi tapirakekumasakiku mase to ametuti no kamwi wo kopinomi ikanaramu tositukwipi ni ka tutuzipana nipopyeru kimi ga nipodorino nadusapi komu to tatite wite matikyemu pito pa opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi ositeru nanipa no kuni ni aratamano tosi puru madeni sirwotapeno koromo mo posazu asayopi ni arituru kimi pa ikasamani omopimase ka utusemi no wosiki ko no yo wo tuyusimono okite inikyemu toki ni arazusite

sentence.transcription: wosi ki ko no yo wo

block.header: kinopu koso kimi pa arisika omopanu ni pamamatu no upe ni kumo ni tanabiku
itusika to matu ramu imo ni tamadusa no koto dani tugezu inisi kimi kamo
wagimokwo ga misi tomonoura no murwonokwi pa tokoyo ni aredo misi pito so naki

sentence.transcription: mi si tomo no ura no
mi si pito so na ki

block.header: tomonoura no iswo no murwonokwi mimu gotoni apimisi imo pa wasurayeme ya mo
iswo no upe ni nebapu murwonokwi misi pito wo idura to twopaba kataritugemu ka
imo to kosi minume no saki wo kapyerusa ni pitori site mireba namitagumasi mo
yukusa ni pa putari wa ga misi ko no saki wo pitori sugureba kokoro kanasi mo

sentence.transcription: puta ri wa ga mi si

block.header: yukusa ni pa putari wa ga misi ko no saki wo pitori sugureba mi mo sakazu kinu

sentence.transcription: puta ri wa ga mi si
mi mo saka zu ki nu

block.header: pito mo naki munasiki ipye pa kusamakura tabi ni masarite kurusikarikyeri
imo to site putari tukurisi wa ga sima pa kodakaku sigeku narinikyeru kamo
wagimokwo ga uwesi ume no kwi miru gotoni kokoro musetutu namita si nagaru
pasikiyasi sakayesi kimi no imasiseba kinopu mo kyepu mo wa wo myesamasi wo
kaku nomwi ni arikyeru monowo pagwi no pana sakite ari ya to twopisi kimi pa mo
kimi ni kwopwi ita mo subye nami asitadu no ne nomwi si nakayu asayopi nisite
toponagaku tukapemu mono to omopyerisi kimi imasaneba kokorodwo mo nasi
midorikwo no papitamotopori asayopi ni ne nomwi so wa ga naku kimi nasi nisite

sentence.transcription: ne nomwi so wa ga naku

block.header: miredo akazu imasisi kimi ga momitiba no uturiiyukeba kanasiku mo aru ka

takudunwono sirakwi no kuni yu pitogoto wo yosi to kikasite twopisakuru ugara paragara naki kuni ni watarikimasite opokimi no sikimasu kuni ni utipisasu miyakwo simimini satwoipye pa sapani aredomo ikasamani omopikyeme kamo ture mo naki sapo no yamapye ni nakukwonasu sitapikimasite sikitapeno ipye wo mo tukuri aratamano tosinowo nagaku sumapitutu imasisi monowo ikyeru mono sinu to ipu koto ni manukarenu mono ni si areba tanomyerisi pito no kotogoto kusamakura tabi n aru potwo ni sapogapa wo asakapa watari kasuganwo wo sogapi ni mitutu asipikwino yamapye wo sasite kurekureto kakurimasinure ipamu subye semu subye sirani tamotopori tada pitori site sirwotapeno koromode posazu nagekitutu wa ga naku namita arimayama kumowi tanabiki ame ni puriki ya
todomeenu inoti ni si areba sikitape no ipye yu pa idete kumogakuriniki
ima ywori pa akikaze samuku pukinamu wo ikani ka pitori nagaki ywo wo nemu

sentence.transcription: naga ki ywo wo ne mu

block.header: nagaki ywo wo pitori ya nemu to kimi ga ipeba sugwinisi pito no omopoyuraku ni

sentence.transcription: pito ri ya ne mu to

block.header: aki saraba mitutu sinwopye to imo ga uwesi nipa no nadesikwo sakinikyeru kamo
utusemi no yo pa tunenasi to siru monowo akikaze samumi sinwopituru kamo

sentence.transcription: yo pa tune na si to

block.header: wa ga nipa ni pana so sakitaru so wo miredo kokoro mo yukazu pasikiyasi imo ga ariseba mikamo nasu putari narabiwi taworite mo misemasi monowo utusemi no kareru mwi nareba tuyusimo no kenuru ga gotoku asipikwino yamadi wo sasite iripi nasu kakurinisikaba soko mopu ni mune koso itame ipi mo ezu naduke mo sirazu atwo mo naki yononaka ni areba semu subye mo nasi

sentence.transcription: se mu subye mo na si

block.header: toki pa si mo itu mo aramu wo kokoro itaku iyuku wagimo ka midorikwo wo okite
idete yuku miti siramaseba arakazime imo wo todomemu seki mo okamasi wo
imo ga misi nipa ni pana saki toki pa penu wa ga naku namita imada pwinaku ni
kaku nomwi ni arikyeru monowo imo mo ware mo titose no gotoku tanomitarikyeri
ipye sakari imasu wagimo wo todomekane yamagakusiture kokorodwo mo nasi
yononaka si tune kaku nomwi to katu siredo itaki kokoro pa sinobwikanetu mo
sapoyama ni tanabiku kasumi miru gotoni imo wo omopide nakanu pi pa nasi

sentence.transcription: naka nu pi pa na si

block.header: mukasi koso yoso ni mo misika wagimokwo ga okutukwi to omopeba pasiki sapoyama

kakemaku mo ayani kasikwosi ipamaku mo yuyusiki kamo wa go opokimi mikwo no mikoto yoroduyo ni myesitamapamasi opoyamato kuninomiyakwo pa utinabiku paru sarinureba yamapye ni pa pana sakiwowori kapase ni pa ayukwo sabasiri iya pikyeni sakayuru toki ni oyodure no tapakoto to ka mo sirwotape ni toneri yosopite wadukayama mikosi tatasite pisakatano ame sirasinure koimarobi pidutinakedomo semu subye mo nasi

sentence.transcription: se mu subye mo na si

block.header: wa go opokimi ame sirasamu to omopaneba oboni so mikyeru wadukaswomayama
asipikwino yama sape pikari saku pana no tirinuru gotoki wa go opokimi kamo

kakemaku mo ayani kasikwosi wa go opokimi mikwo no mikoto no mononopuno yaswotomonowo wo myesitudwope adomopitamapi asagari ni sisi pumiokosi yupugari ni tori pumitate opomima no kuti osapetate mikokoro wo myesiakiramesi ikudiyama kodati no sizini saku pana mo uturopinikyeri yononaka pa kaku nomwi na rasi masurawo no kokoro puriokosi turugitati kosi ni toripaki adusayumi yuki toriopite ametuti to iya toponagani yoroduyo ni kaku si moga mo to tanomyerisi mikwo no mikadwo no sabape nasu sawaku toneri pa sirwotape ni koromo torikite tune narisi wemapipurumapi iya pikyeni kaparapu mireba kanasiki rokamo

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo wo
kaku si mo ga mo to

block.header: pasiki kamo mikwo no mikoto no arigaywopi myesisi ikudi no miti pa arenikyeri
opotomo no na ni opu yuki opite yoroduyo ni tanomisi kokoro iduku ka yosemu

sirwotapeno swode sasikapete nabikinuru wa ga kurwokami no masiraka ni narinamu kipami aratayo ni tomoni aramu to tamanowono tayezi iimo to musubitesi koto pa patasazu omopyerisi kokoro pa togezu sirwotapeno tamoto wo wakare nikibwinisi ipye yu mo idete midorikwo no naku wo mo okite asagwiri no oboni naritutu yamasiro no sagarakayama no yama no ma ni yukisugwinureba ipamu subye semu subye sirani wagimokwo to sanesi tumaya ni asita ni pa idetati sinwopi yupupye ni pa iriwi nagekapi wakibasamu kwo no naku gotoni wotokwozimono opi mi udaki mi asatorino ne nomwi nakitutu kwopuredomo sirusi wo namito kototopanu mono ni pa aredo wagimokwo ga irinisi yama wo yosuka to so omopu

sentence.transcription: sa ne si tuma ya ni

block.header: utusemino yo no koto ni areba yoso ni misi yama wo ya ima pa yosu ka to omopamu

sentence.transcription: yosu ka to omo pa mu

block.header: asatorino ne nomwi si nakayu wagimokwo ni ima mata sarani apu yosi wo nami
